nasb.text: But Barak pursued the chariots and the army as far as Harosheth-hagoyim, and all the army of Sisera fell by the edge of the sword; not even one was left.

esv.text: And Barak pursued the chariots and the army to Harosheth-hagoyim, and all the army of Sisera fell by the edge of the sword; not a man was left.

cnv.text: 巴拉追趕西西拉的車輛和軍隊，直到夏羅設歌印；西西拉的全軍都倒在刀下，連一個也沒有留下。

ccb.text: 巴拉追击他的战车和军队，直到夏罗设。西西拉全军都死于刀下，无一幸免。
